km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Henricus De Cam是Radulphus De Cam的兒子，於1325年出生在英國。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henricus De Cam是Radulphus De Cam的儿子，于1325年出生在英国。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Ba, Chau, Coung, Cun, Cuong, Duc, Giao, Hai, Hieu, Hoa, Hoanh, Hung, Kinh Van.  Chinese Kang, Wing, Ying, Young.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 甘, see   Gan   1.
Vietnamese (Cầm): from the Chinese surname 琴, see Qin 2.

variants.name: Camm
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Cam  .

variants.name: Gan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Li, Hong, Hua, Jee, Jian, Cheong, Chin, Chuan, Eng, Hui Ming, Jianmin, Jing.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 甘, meaning ‘sweet, pleasant’ in Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Gan Pan (甘盤), a high official during the reign of King Wu Ding (died 1192  BC ), in the Shang dynasty. (ii) from Gan (甘), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Shaanxi province) during the Xia dynasty (2070–1600  BC ). (iii) from Gan (甘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Luoyang in Henan province) granted to Dai, who was known as Gan Zhao Gong (甘昭公, Duke Zhao of Gan), son of King Xiang of Zhou (died 619  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 干, meaning ‘shield’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Gan Chou (干犨), an official in the state of Song (located in present-day Shangqiu in Henan province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). (ii) from the placename Gan (邗), the name of a fief (located in present-day Yangzhou in Jiangsu province) that was granted to the son of King Wu of Zhou (c. 1087–1043 BC ). When the placename was adopted as a surname, people simplified the Chinese character 邗 to 干, which has the same pronunciation. (iii) from the placename Gan Sui (干隧) (located in present-day Wuxian in Jiangsu province). (iv) from the He Gan (紇干) family, of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surname to 干 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534 AD ). (v) from the compound surname Gan-Lei (干類), said to be originally the name of an ancient state (unknown location) prior to the Xia dynasty (2070–1600 BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Henricus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hendricks
meanings: Dutch and North German: patronymic from the personal name   Hendrick  . See also   Hendriks  .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Henricus De Cam was born in 1325, in England as the son of Radulphus De Cam. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Henricus De Cam est né en 1325, à Angleterre, fils de Radulphus De Cam. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Henricus De Cam wurde 1325 in England, als Sohn von Radulphus De Cam geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Henricus De Cam è nato il nel 1325 nel England come figlio di Radulphus De Cam. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Henricus De Camは1325年にイギリスでRadulphus De Camの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Henricus De Cam(은)는 1325년 영국에서 Radulphus De Cam의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henricus De Cam nasceu em 1325, em Inglaterra filho de Radulphus De Cam. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Henricus De Cam родился в 1325 г. в местности Англия. Его отца звали Radulphus De Cam. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Henricus De Cam nació en 1325, en Inglaterra como hijo de Radulphus De Cam. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
